meanings.definition: enlarge, develop, or increase by degrees or in stages

examples: Resistance to the manager's plan built up quickly
Pressure is building up at the Indian-Pakistani border

meanings.definition: prepare oneself for a military confrontation
examples: The U.S. is girding for a conflict in the Middle East
troops are building up on the Iraqi border
ramp up security in the airports

meanings.definition: change the use of and make available or usable
examples: The country developed its natural resources
The remote areas of the country were gradually built up
